subject: Luxio, the electric feline Pokemon, leaping with a lightning arc
description: A compact feline Pokemon with a dark navy body and yellow facial markings surges forward in a dynamic leaping pose, mouth open wide. A vivid blue-white lightning arc sweeps dramatically behind and around it, filling the frame with electric energy. The background is a rush of blue-white kinetic streaks suggesting high-speed motion. The creature's expression is fierce and charged, conveying electricity through both posture and literal visual effect.
foreground: dark feline creature lunging forward, surrounded by electric arc
emotion: fierce and aggressive, mid-lunge with open mouth
